lane_title: ComfyUI Workflow API Automation and Gradio Bridge Patterns
title: workflow-json-vs-api-prompt-json
summary: Explain the difference between ComfyUI workflow JSON saved for the UI graph and API prompt JSON used for execution automation.
use_when: The user has a workflow JSON but cannot queue it through the API, or asks why API export looks different from normal workflow save.
chunking_hint: Retrieve the lane overview, API pattern guide, and source anchors together. Preserve endpoint names exactly.

question_patterns: how do I call ComfyUI API
how do I launch ComfyUI from PowerShell
answer_intent: Explain local ComfyUI launch, route basics, workflow JSON vs API prompt JSON, and safe localhost defaults.
canonical_summary: ComfyUI automation usually uses API prompt JSON posted to /prompt, then /history and /view for results. Launch locally on 127.0.0.1 unless intentionally exposing a secured server.
